channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [METHODHUB] Methodhub Software Ltd Considering Acquisition of a USA-based Entity
item.description:
Methodhub Software Limited is evaluating a potential acquisition of a foreign entity incorporated in the USA. The company has signed a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) with the concerned parties, preventing the disclosure of the target entity's name and details at this stage. The proposed transaction is subject to the completion of detailed due diligence by the company. Upon satisfactory completion, the company plans to enter into definitive agreements, including a Share Purchase Agreement, for the acquisition of up to 100% of the equity share capital of the foreign entity. Methodhub Software Limited will make appropriate disclosures as and when there are further material developments, in compliance with applicable provisions of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

  • Methodhub Software Ltd is considering acquiring a USA-based entity.
  • The proposed transaction is subject to detailed due diligence.
  • The company plans to enter into definitive agreements upon completion of due diligence.
  • The acquisition will be of up to 100% of the equity share capital of the foreign entity.
  • Methodhub Software Limited will make necessary disclosures as per SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Methodhub Software Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [PNB] Punjab National Bank Makes No Encumbrance on PNB Housing Finance Shares in FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Punjab National Bank, the promoter of PNB Housing Finance Limited, has not made any encumbrance directly or indirectly in respect of its shareholding in the company during the year ended 31.03.2026. This information is being submitted to the Audit Committee of the Company in compliance with Regulation 31 (4) & (5) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Punjab National Bank, the promoter of PNB Housing Finance Limited, did not encumber its shares in FY 2025-2026
  • This information is being submitted to the Audit Committee of the Company
  • The disclosure is in compliance with SEBI regulations 31 (4) & (5)

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PUNJAB NATIONAL BANK | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [EMAMIREAL] Emami Realty Ltd. to Consider Allotment of Equity Shares for Warrant Conversion
item.description:
Emami Realty Ltd. announced that a meeting of the Finance Committee will be held on 8th April 2026 to consider and approve the allotment of equity shares pursuant to the conversion of outstanding warrants. This decision is in accordance with the SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018. Additionally, the Trading Window for dealing in securities of the Company is closed from 1st April 2026 for designated persons and their immediate relatives till the end of 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results of the Company for the 4th quarter and year ended 31st March, 2026.

  • Emami Realty Ltd. to consider allotment of equity shares for warrant conversion.
  • The decision is in accordance with the SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018.
  • Trading Window for dealing in securities of the Company is closed for designated persons and their immediate relatives.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Emami Realty Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [TRITON] Triton Corp Ltd Approves Setting Up of Biomass Pellet Manufacturing Plant
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Triton Corp Ltd has announced the approval of a proposal to set up a Biomass Pellet Manufacturing Plant in Morena, Madhya Pradesh. The plant will have a capacity of 5 Tons Per Hour (TPH) and is expected to commence operations by mid of Financial Year 2026–27, subject to necessary approvals. The project is an expansion of business operations in the clean and renewable energy sector, aiming to expand presence in the renewable energy and biomass fuel segment. The financing for the project will be through a mix of internal accruals and debt. The project does not involve any related party transactions.

  • Triton Corp Ltd approves setting up of Biomass Pellet Manufacturing Plant
  • Plant to be set up in Morena, Madhya Pradesh with a capacity of 5 TPH
  • Project is an expansion in the clean and renewable energy sector
  • Expected to commence operations by mid of Financial Year 2026–27
  • Financing will be through a mix of internal accruals and debt

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TRITON CORP.LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [VENUSREM] Venus Remedies Ltd: No New Encumbrances or Pledges of Shares as of March 31, 2026
item.description:
In accordance with Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, Pawan Chaudhary, Manu Chaudhary, Peeyush Jain, Ashutosh Jain, Akshansh Chaudhary, and Sunev Pharma Solutions Pvt. Ltd., promoters and promoter group of Venus Remedies Limited, have declared that they have not made or released any encumbrance of shares of Venus Remedies Limited as of March 31, 2026. Furthermore, no equity shares of promoters and promoter group are encumbered or pledged.

  • Venus Remedies Ltd promoters and promoter group declare no new encumbrances of shares as of March 31, 2026.
  • No equity shares of promoters and promoter group are encumbered or pledged.
  • Disclosure made under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VENUS REMEDIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [MOL] Meghmani Organics Approves Scheme of Amalgamation with Kilburn Chemicals and Meghmani Crop Nutrition
item.description:
Meghmani Organics Ltd has approved a draft scheme of amalgamation for Kilburn Chemicals Limited and Meghmani Crop Nutrition Limited, both wholly owned subsidiaries. The scheme aims to simplify the overall group structure, optimize resources, and provide opportunities for leveraging and pooling resources. Expected benefits include operational and financial synergies, better administration, and cost reduction.

  • Meghmani Organics has approved a draft scheme of amalgamation for Kilburn Chemicals and Meghmani Crop Nutrition Limited
  • The amalgamation aims to simplify the overall group structure and optimize resources
  • The scheme is expected to provide operational and financial synergies, better administration, and cost reduction
  • Kilburn Chemicals and Meghmani Crop Nutrition are wholly owned subsidiaries of Meghmani Organics
  • The amalgamation is subject to necessary approvals from shareholders, creditors, the National Company Law Tribunal, and other regulatory authorities

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Meghmani Organics Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [DEVITRD] Devinsu Trading Ltd. Announces Extra Ordinary General Meeting for Director Appointments
item.description:
Devinsu Trading Ltd. has issued a notice for an Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) to be held on April 27, 2026, at 11:00 A.M. (IST) at its registered office in Mumbai. The EGM is to seek approval from the members for the appointment of three new directors through ordinary and special resolutions. The notice includes the details of the EGM, the proposed directors, and the resolutions to be passed. The EGM will also be conducted through remote e-voting process.

  • Devinsu Trading Ltd. has called for an Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) on April 27, 2026.
  • The EGM will be held at the company's registered office in Mumbai.
  • Three new directors are proposed to be appointed through ordinary and special resolutions.
  • The EGM will be conducted through remote e-voting process.
  • The notice for the EGM includes the details of the meeting, the proposed directors, and the resolutions to be passed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DEVINSU TRADING LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SUNCITYSY] Suncity Synthetics Ltd Revises BM Outcome, Announces Preferential Issue of Shares
item.description:
Suncity Synthetics Ltd has revised the outcome of its Board Meeting held on 20th March 2026. The company has clarified a typographical error in the disclosure relating to the post-reduction share capital. The company has applied for reduction of share capital, which is pending before the NCLT. The proposed preferential issue of shares is not part of any earlier reduction of capital petition. The new share capital of the company will consist of 30,98,916 Equity shares of Rs. 10/- each after the preferential allotment of shares. The company will issue up to 30,00,000 Equity shares at a price of Rs. 10/- per equity share to various proposed allottees on a preferential basis, subject to the approval of the Members of the Company and applicable regulatory/ statutory authorities.

  • Suncity Synthetics Ltd revises BM outcome due to a typographical error
  • Company has applied for reduction of share capital, pending before NCLT
  • Preferential issue of shares is not part of any earlier reduction of capital petition
  • New share capital of the company will consist of 30,98,916 Equity shares of Rs. 10/- each after preferential allotment
  • Company to issue up to 30,00,000 Equity shares at a price of Rs. 10/- per equity share to various proposed allottees

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUNCITY SYNTHETICS LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [UNIFIED] Unified Data Tech Solutions Ltd Appoints Mrs. Anita Sethia as Additional Director
item.description:
Unified Data Tech Solutions Ltd has appointed Mrs. Anita Sethia as an Additional Director, Non-Executive in Independent capacity, with effect from 6th April, 2026. She has been appointed for an initial term of 5 (five) years commencing from April 6, 2026, up to April 5, 2031. Mrs. Sethia has gained valuable experience as an Independent Director and has served as a member of various Board Committees. She is not related to any of the Directors of the Company and is not debarred from holding the office of Director by virtue of any SEBI Order or any other such Authority.

  • Appointment of Mrs. Anita Sethia as Additional Director in Independent capacity.
  • Mrs. Sethia's term of appointment is 5 years from April 6, 2026, to April 5, 2031.
  • Mrs. Sethia has valuable experience as an Independent Director and has served on various Board Committees.
  • Mrs. Sethia is not related to any of the Directors of the Company.
  • Mrs. Sethia is not debarred from holding the office of Director by virtue of any SEBI Order or any other such Authority.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Unified Data Tech Solutions Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ELITECON] Elitecon International Ltd: Independent Director, Ms. Anjali Bamboria, Resigns Effective April 3, 2026
item.description:
Elitecon International Limited announced the resignation of its Non-Executive Independent Director, Ms. Anjali Bamboria, effective from the closing hours of April 3, 2026. The resignation was tendered via letter dated April 3, 2026. Ms. Bamboria served as a member of the Audit Committee and Stakeholder Relationship Committee. The company has complied with the necessary regulations and has disclosed the required information as per Regulation 30 of the LODR Regulations and SEBI Master Circulars.

  • Ms. Anjali Bamboria has resigned from her position as Non-Executive Independent Director of Elitecon International Limited.
  • The resignation is effective from the closing hours of April 3, 2026.
  • Ms. Bamboria served as a member of the Audit Committee and Stakeholder Relationship Committee.
  • The company has complied with the necessary regulations and disclosed the required information as per Regulation 30 of the LODR Regulations and SEBI Master Circulars.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Elitecon International Ltd | Category: Management Change
